channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Creepy robot mom that gives birth is training future midwives
item.description: Meet Mama Anne, a lifelike childbirth simulator that blinks, breathes and talks, helping midwifery students practice real labor scenarios safely.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Jurors weigh evidence in high-stakes Meta trial about social media risks to children
item.description: A daunting stream of testimony and evidence has been presented in a New Mexico case that explores what the social media conglomerate Meta knew about the effects of its platforms on children.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: Teens are suing Elon Musk’s xAI over sexually explicit images, seeking class action status
item.description: Three teenagers in Tennessee sued Elon Musk’s xAI this week, claiming the company’s image-generation tools were used to morph real photos of them into explicitly sexual images.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: Teenagers sue Musk's xAI claiming image-generator made sexually explicit images of them as minors
item.description: Three teenagers in Tennessee have sued Elon Musk’s xAI, claiming the company’s image-generation tools were used to morph real photos of them into explicitly sexual images.
item.dc:creator: Travis Loller, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Music giant BMG sues Anthropic over AI training
item.description: Music giant BMG has filed a lawsuit against Anthropic, the company behind the popular chatbot Claude, alleging it trained its AI models using copyrighted song lyrics from artists such as the Rolling Stones, Bruno Mars, and Ariana Grande.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: China's Alibaba targets $100B in AI and cloud revenue over 5 years
item.description: China’s Alibaba Group has pledged on Thursday a goal of surpassing $100 billion in revenue from its artificial intelligence and cloud businesses over the next five years, which it says would be powered by the AI demand boom.
item.dc:creator: Chan Ho-Him, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Uber expands women driver preference nationwide
item.description: Uber's Women Preferences feature lets female riders request female drivers nationwide for added safety and comfort during their rides, the company says.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Iran war set to hit global IT spending, IDC warns
item.description: The conflict in the Middle East threatens to weigh heavily on the global economy, with soaring oil prices expected to dampen GDP growth and prompt businesses and consumers to reduce technology spending, according to analysts at IDC.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: OpenAI’s $50B AWS deal puts its Microsoft alliance to the test
item.description: Despite OpenAI’s multiple re-affirmations that its relationship with Microsoft is strong and central, in view of recent developments, Redmond doesn’t seem to be convinced.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Mistral launches Forge to help enterprises build their own AI models
item.description: Mistral has introduced Forge, a new platform aimed at helping enterprises move beyond generic AI systems by enabling them to train and adapt models on proprietary data. Today’s AI systems are largely developed using open internet data and are built to handle a wide variety of general tasks.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: USAT to Distribute Digital Dollars to Thousands During St. Patrick’s Day Celebration in Times Square
item.description: This St. Patrick’s Day, USAT is putting digital currency directly into the pockets of thousands of New Yorkers. USAT, the digital dollar issued by Anchorage Digital Bank, is taking over Times Square as 2 million spectators flood the streets.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: USAT Leverages Times Square Crowd to Demonstrate Instant Digital Dollar Payments
item.description: USAT is transforming Times Square into a live demonstration of instant, internet-native payments. The digital dollar, issued by Anchorage Digital Bank, is taking over Times Square as 2 million spectators flood the streets of New York City for St. Patrick’s Day.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Robot firefighters enter burning buildings first
item.description: New robotic firefighting vehicles use thermal cameras and water cannons to locate fires and hazards before firefighters step inside a building.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Chip wafer shortage will run through 2030 as AI demand overwhelms supply: SK Hynix chief
item.description: The global shortage of semiconductor wafers will not ease before the end of the decade, SK Group Chairman Chey Tae-won said, delivering one of the most definitive long-range forecasts yet from the executive of the world’s leading supplier of high-bandwidth memory chips.
item.dc:creator: Network World
